feature.name: YAML config bootstrap
feature.description: Extract layered YAML config loading, env expansion, and deep merge bootstrap used by VibeShop.
included_behaviors: deep-merge layered config dicts with later overrides
bootstrap default/app/pricing/tiers YAML layers from a directory
record bootstrap side effects in process registry state
excluded_behaviors: legacy shallow merge helper for production use
original project tests and CLI entrypoints

entanglement.description: Config bootstrap mutates GLOBAL_STATE while loading multiple YAML layers and depends on deep merge helpers co-located with loader side effects.
signals: YAML load increments counters and appends config_paths in GLOBAL_STATE
bootstrap wires four config files with nested merge semantics
duplicate merge helpers with incorrect shallow variant

output.import: from featurelifted import bootstrap_config, merge_config_layers; from featurelifted.config_loader import load_yaml_config; from featurelifted.state import GLOBAL_STATE, reset_state
